'''dangaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ooplah|ooplah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ooplah|ooplah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dangaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dængæbæth|dængæbæth]] || [[word:dængæbæj|dængæbæj]] || [[word:dængæbæsh|dængæbæsh]] || [[word:dængæbæ|dængæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dangangabath|dangangabath]] || [[word:dangangabaj|dangangabaj]] || [[word:dangangabash|dangangabash]] || [[word:dangangaba|dangangaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dangabath|dangabath]] || [[word:dangabaj|dangabaj]] || [[word:dangabash|dangabash]] || [[word:dangaba|dangaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dangafbath|dangafbath]] || [[word:dangafbaj|dangafbaj]] || [[word:dangafbash|dangafbash]] || [[word:dangafbaf|dangafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dangabatha|dangabatha]] || [[word:dangabaja|dangabaja]] || [[word:dangabasha|dangabasha]] || [[word:dangabaka|dangabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dangabath|dangabath]] || [[word:dangabaj|dangabaj]] || [[word:dangabash|dangabash]] || [[word:dangaba|dangaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dangabathal|dangabathal]] || [[word:dangabajal|dangabajal]] || [[word:dangabashal|dangabashal]] || [[word:dangabakal|dangabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dangabathatha|dangabathatha]] || [[word:dangabajaja|dangabajaja]] || [[word:dangabashasha|dangabashasha]] || [[word:dangabaka|dangabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dangabathan|dangabathan]] || [[word:dangabajan|dangabajan]] || [[word:dangabashan|dangabashan]] || [[word:dangabakan|dangabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dangabathaoro|dangabathaoro]] || [[word:dangabajaoro|dangabajaoro]] || [[word:dangabashaoro|dangabashaoro]] || [[word:dangabakaoro|dangabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
